headlines.title: AI robotics: Moving from the lab to the real-world factory floor
headlines.summary: Learn the real-world infrastructure and effort required to deploy AI robotics from leaders at Universal Robots, PickNik, and Path Robotics.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle factory, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: How the Visa-Mastercard card fee case may end
headlines.summary: A federal court is likely to weigh how much a proposed settlement over interchange fees differs from a pact that was rejected two years ago.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: German court rules in favor of Teradyne Robotics, issues injunction against Elite Robots
headlines.summary: Teradyne has obtained an injunction from a German court as it pursues a claim against Elite Robots for copying its UR cobot software.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.

headlines.title: Report finds that while 500k+ robots were installed last year, partner layer is still hard to map
headlines.summary: Identifying the leading robotics vendors and regions is straightforward, but mapping integrator partners is not, found Georg Stieler.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.

political_items.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
political_items.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time

political_items.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
